BackstoryDef.title: Cultivator
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef]Learned the art of cultivation in adulthood. With the support of his family, [PAWN_pronoun] took the path of immortal cultivation.

BackstoryDef.title: Free cultivator
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef]'s cultivation path was not smooth. After many years of hard work, [PAWN_nameDef] chose to travel the world in the clouds and live without restraints.

BackstoryDef.title: Revenge cultivator
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] Once a cultivator, [PAWN_pronoun] was severely wounded in a siege against the cultivators. All of [PAWN_possessive]'s companions were killed, but [PAWN_pronoun] managed to escape. From that moment on, revenge became [PAWN_possessive]'s main goal.

BackstoryDef.title: Bad cultivator
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has experienced a walk-in, which has irreversibly altered [PAWN_possessive]'s brain. [PAWN_pronoun] became incapable of using long range weapons and has a short and irritable temper.

BackstoryDef.title: Successful assassin
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] used to infiltrate a faction and kill its leader, so [Pawn_namedef] gained self-confidence.

BackstoryDef.title: Unknown assassin
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] did not like to kill people, [PAWN_pronoun] just to make money, went down this road.

BackstoryDef.title: Sword mad man
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] went further and further in his study of kendo, and [PAWN_pronoun] once killed a man in the street who despised [PAWN_pronoun's] swordsmanship, and then fled the scene.

BackstoryDef.title: Sword mad man
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has a very high talent for kendo, but [PAWN_pronoun] lost a duel to a swordsman who was younger than [PAWN_pronoun], so [PAWN_pronoun] gradually exceeded the ordinary people's training, and eventually became a sword-lover. But [PAWN_pronoun] doesn't care, [PAWN_pronoun] just wants to wield the sword!

BackstoryDef.title: Wicked cultivator
BackstoryDef.description: Kidnapping, stealing, robbing, [PAWN_nameDef] has never cared to gain profit through normal means.

BackstoryDef.title: Nobody
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has been quietly playing bystander in the world, and with each new place, [PAWN_pronoun] lives under a different identity.

BackstoryDef.title: Dishonest businessman
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is not only miserly, but greedy. [PAWN_pronoun] won't let any lucrative business go by, nor will he let any scrap of silver slip through [PAWN_possessive]'s fingers.
